framework_profile.framework: Claude Code skill: Python scripts under skills/adversarial-spec/scripts/
framework_profile.enforcement_model: module-enforced shape validation mirroring fizzy gate; sender allowlist on inbound replies

story_alignment.rationale: single entry point serves repeatable-process goal
late ConOps derivation is G4 verbatim
pre-implementation rows satisfy anti-hindsight + gate schema
intent-based oracles; NG5 reinforced not violated
async evidence taxonomy keeps Jason cost to one digest
deterministic reply grammar supports sole-oracle judgment
mechanical close path serves V-close goal; NG1 conformance
remediation loop required for satisfiable close
local self-check explicitly permitted by NG4 carve-out
auditable refresh rule is G5 verbatim
executed evidence before digest keeps judgment grounded in intent

research_findings.finding: gate reject classes, _sha256_prefix bidirectional prefix-match, strict-subset anti-relabeling, result enum accepts not-applicable
established pattern: doc-driven process, code-checked shapes, structured exit codes
wrapper does no message splitting; raw 4096-char Telegram limit; 3500-char budget chosen
advisory locks released on process death; 10s timeout pattern pinned at 3.16.1 skill-wide

dimensions.name: execution model
dimensions.rationale: mirrors mini_spec_emission.py pattern; NG4 forbids servers

dimensions.name: concurrency
dimensions.value: filelock + atomic rename, single mutating writer
dimensions.rationale: established TASK_LOCK pattern; crash-safe by construction

dimensions.name: error model
dimensions.rationale: LLM conductor needs machine-readable issues for the playbook

dimensions.name: I/O
dimensions.value: JSON ledger + markdown artifacts + Telegram part files

dimensions.name: testing architecture
dimensions.value: pytest over module; dogfood validation of process itself
dimensions.rationale: verification=pytest, validation=US-10 dogfood, disjoint by construction
